P11_eibar_vs_malaga.analysis: Málaga in playoff zone (6th), strong away. Eibar fighting for playoffs but inconsistent. Surprise scoreline but Málaga's form explains away win.
P11_eibar_vs_malaga.lesson: Teams in playoff spots (3rd-6th) are DANGEROUS away. They have something to play for and are typically strong squads.

P13_sporting_vs_ceuta.analysis: Ceuta as newly promoted team beating Sporting away. Classic surprise from team with nothing to lose.
P13_sporting_vs_ceuta.lesson: Newly promoted teams in comfortable mid-table positions can be fearless away. No relegation pressure, no promotion expectation = free football.
